rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; US attention remains divided between Iran deal and Ukraine support — no qualitative change but Western aid uncertainty persists.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War on Ukrainian territory continues with no ceasefire or qualitative shift this cycle. Daily life remains under direct threat from strikes and mobilization.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued US focus on Iran deal means Washington's attention and diplomatic bandwidth remain divided, potentially delaying or diluting military and financial support for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Two killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
top_events.summary: Middle East conflict continues but has no direct bearing on Ukraine's war situation or Western aid flows this cycle.
